title: Wham Crystal 3x 110L Plastic Storage Boxes with Lids. Clear, Extra Large, Strong (Pack of 3, 110 Litre) Made in the UK
features: Storage Types: Ideal for home storage in storage cupboards, garages, lofts and more.
Thoughtful Design: Clear design so you can see the contents really easily. Plus they're stackable when in use (just pop the lids on and stack them up) and nestable when not
Large size: These boxes are big at approximately 110 litres in capacity. The size makes them ideal for storing wrapping paper, craft materials, bedding or storing decorations when not in use
Secure Handles: Which also include a clip on the lid with easy to hold handles
description: A set of 3 high quality Wham 110 litre plastic storage boxes from our Crystal range. These boxes are a versatile storage option to help you organise your home and office. The set comes in a pack of 3 110 litre boxes and 3 clip on lids. These multi purpose boxes are ideal for use in offices, home office, bedrooms, lofts, storage cupboards, storage units and more around the home and office. We've designed these boxes with clear sides and clear lids to make it easy to view the contents. The boxes are stackable when in use and nest inside one another when not. Made right here in the UK . Contains: 3x 110L Wham Plastic Storage Boxes
